name: Typeform
price_basis: Basic plan at $39 monthly billing, $28 per month billed annually, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KILL: $468 a year to ask questions. A form is one route and a JSON file on a server you already own.
what_zo_builds: A /forms route per form: your questions, one per screen if you like the conversational feel, posting to a submissions file in your workspace. An automation emails you each response and appends it to a CSV you can open anywhere. Zo can also generate the thank-you page, redirect logic, and a private /results dashboard. Response limits stop existing because there is no meter.
dont_kill_if: Your forms take payments inside Typeform or feed a marketing stack a client depends on. Money through a form is a wall; move that flow deliberately or not at all.
build_brief: Goal: replace my paid Typeform with forms I own. Export existing forms and all responses first. Build /form/[name] routes that render my questions, validate answers, and append submissions to per-form JSON files. Add an automation that emails me each new response and a private /results page with counts and a CSV download. Test with one live form for one week alongside Typeform. Done when the responses match, the old embeds are swapped, and the plan is canceled.
